title: Verify Backend Controlled Incentive Offer
description: Tests that the discount offer is correctly shown or hidden based on a backend configuration.

steps.description: 1. Ensure the 'First Month Discount' offer is DISABLED in the backend.
2. As the user, navigate through the cancellation flow past the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up.
4. Now, ensure the 'First Month Discount' offer is ENABLED in the backend.

expected_result: In step 3, the user should be taken directly to the feedback pop-up after confirming cancellation. In step 6, the user should be shown the discount offer pop-up.
